message:
fix: make HTTP-level timeouts retryable

context.DeadlineExceeded from the HTTP client (server was slow) should
be retried. The Retry loop already bails when the parent context is
done (TimeoutPerStep/TimeoutTotal expired), so this only affects
transport-level timeouts where the step context is still alive.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
